summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, building enablement systems grounded in evidence, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve how teams ramp and execute—through human-centered, data-driven approaches.

bullets.text: Build {prog|onboarding and enablement} systems—pathways, playbooks, and knowledge assets—that {ex|ramp} new team members and reduced ramp time by 75%
Codify patterns and lessons into reusable {prog|resources}, leveraging {tools|AI tools} and automation for compounding leverage over one-off solutions
Operate the core cadence behind 20+ programs: planning, {cross|stakeholder} coordination, content refresh, and scheduling across teams
Measure ramp and enablement effectiveness via {data|adoption signals and feedback loops}, using data to improve the system over time
Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences, turning {data|adoption and feedback signals} into actionable reports that guided C-suite decisions
Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming {data|feedback data} into structured guidance that strengthened execution consistency
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Improved {ex|team experience} via 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
Optimized {ex|onboarding} processes across 3 global locations by conducting process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Piloted an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Directed a Mergers & Acquisitions project, aligning {cross|cross-functional} stakeholders through structured change management
Strengthened {ex|engagement} via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
Developed proficiency across HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants
Facilitate CEO/HR discovery and stakeholder interviews to diagnose drivers and bring structure to ambiguous, fast-changing knowledge
Upskill HR to audit 300+ leave cases, turning informal knowledge into clear, repeatable systems others can rely on

changeLog: 2026-05-30: Tailored for OpenAI — Onboarding & Enablement PM, FDE (SF; AI-native enablement systems for technical teams, compounding leverage, playbooks, knowledge systems, ramp metrics). Header → SF (Open to Relocation). Title noun → Strategic Program Manager. Lead InGenius (Set D tech/AI emphasis: build enablement systems/playbooks/knowledge assets, codify reusable resources via AI for compounding leverage, operate cadence, measure ramp via adoption signals). NextGen → adoption/feedback signals + execution consistency. Vestas → onboarding + scaled across >1 team. ODN Pair B (bring structure to ambiguity, turn informal knowledge into repeatable systems). Skills → Program & Knowledge Systems led (Notion/SharePoint OK — JD names knowledge systems); AI Tools + Workflow Automation. HRCI kept (still People-adjacent).
